markdown.markdown:
The Conference aims to promote scientific exchange and interdisciplinary collaboration in the field of **bioactive molecules** and their innovative biotechnological applications.

We welcome original research contributions related to, but not limited to, the following scientific themes.

---

# Scientific Topics

## 🩺 Topic 1 — Pharmacology of Bioactive Molecules and Citizen Health

- Drug discovery
- Pharmacology
- Toxicology
- Therapeutic applications
- Medicinal chemistry

---

## 🌱 Topic 2 — Bioactive Molecules for Food Security and Agro-industry

- Functional foods
- Food biotechnology
- Natural preservatives
- Agricultural biotechnology
- Sustainable food production

---

## 🔬 Topic 3 — Microbial Biotechnologies and Energy Security

- Industrial microbiology
- Fermentation technologies
- Biofuels
- Renewable energy
- Environmental microbiology

---

## 🌍 Topic 4 — Environmental Valorization and Preservation

- Bioremediation
- Circular bioeconomy
- Waste valorization
- Green technologies
- Environmental biotechnology

---

## 🤖 Topic 5 — Digital Innovation and Artificial Intelligence in Biotechnology

- Artificial Intelligence
- Machine Learning
- Bioinformatics
- Computational Biology
- Digital Biotechnology

---

# Submission Guidelines

Authors are invited to submit an original abstract presenting unpublished research.

Submitted abstracts **must**

- be written in **English** or **French**;
- clearly state the objectives, methodology, results, and conclusions;
- address one of the conference themes;
- present original work that has not been previously published.

---

::: {.callout-important}

## 📄 Download the Official Abstract Template

Please prepare your abstract using the official **NCBM 2026** Microsoft Word template.

[⬇️ Download NCBM26 Abstract Template](files/NCBM26_Template.docx){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}

:::

---

# Important Dates

| **Event** | **Date** |
|------------|-----------------|
| Call for Abstracts Opens | July 15, 2026 |
| Abstract Submission Deadline | September 30, 2026 |
| Notification of Acceptance | October 15, 2026 |
| Registration Fee Payment | October 16–31, 2026 |
| Conference | November 29–30, 2026 |


---

# Presentation Formats

Accepted contributions may be presented as

- 🎤 Oral Presentation
- 🖼️ Poster Presentation

The final presentation format will be determined by the Scientific Committee after peer review.

---

# Abstract Submission

Abstract submission will be carried out through the **Microsoft Conference Management Toolkit (Microsoft CMT)**.

::: {.callout-note}

## Submission Portal

The Microsoft CMT submission portal will be available soon.

<!-- Replace the link below once your conference is created -->

<!--
[Submit Your Abstract via Microsoft CMT](https://cmt3.research.microsoft.com/NSBM2026){.btn .btn-success .btn-lg target="_blank"}
-->

:::

---

# Publication

Accepted abstracts will be published in the official **Book of Abstracts** of the conference

Additional publication opportunities will be announced by the Organizing Committee.


::: {.callout-tip}

## We Look Forward to Your Contribution

We warmly invite you to join **NCBM 2026** and share your latest research with scientists, academics, and professionals working in biotechnology and bioactive molecules.

We look forward to welcoming you to **Constantine, Algeria**, on **November 29–30, 2026**.

:::
